description_long: This is a tall, ornate candelabrum with three candle holders, each supporting a cylindrical candle. The structure is primarily composed of a dark metallic material, featuring a wide, round base for stability and a slender, vertically ribbed central stem. The arms of the candelabrum curve outward symmetrically, each ending in a circular drip tray beneath the candle. The candles themselves are a pale, waxy color and appear unused, with no visible flame or melted wax. The overall design is elegant and classical, suitable for decorative use in upscale urban environments such as parks, plazas, or building entrances. The metallic surfaces have a slightly reflective, smooth finish, contributing to its sophisticated appearance.
description: A tall, ornate metal candelabrum with three pale candles and a wide, round base. Its elegant, classical design features curved arms and a smooth, slightly reflective finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three candles and the symmetrical, curved arms extending from the central stem.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the arms and the alignment of the candle holders.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the back curvature of the arms and the full round base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the symmetry and spacing of the candle holders.
